name: Wolshebnik-sort-imports
description: Sort JavaScript/TypeScript imports and CSS/SCSS style properties with smart grouping and configurable modes

keybindings.when: editorTextFocus && (resourceExtname == .js || resourceExtname == .ts || resourceExtname == .jsx || resourceExtname == .tsx || resourceExtname == .css || resourceExtname == .scss || resourceExtname == .less || resourceExtname == .sass)

editorTextFocus && (resourceExtname == .js || resourceExtname == .ts || resourceExtname == .jsx || resourceExtname == .tsx || resourceExtname == .css || resourceExtname == .scss || resourceExtname == .less || resourceExtname == .sass)

editor/context.when: resourceExtname == .js || resourceExtname == .ts || resourceExtname == .jsx || resourceExtname == .tsx || resourceExtname == .css || resourceExtname == .scss || resourceExtname == .less || resourceExtname == .sass

resourceExtname == .js || resourceExtname == .ts || resourceExtname == .jsx || resourceExtname == .tsx || resourceExtname == .css || resourceExtname == .scss || resourceExtname == .less || resourceExtname == .sass

resourceExtname == .js || resourceExtname == .ts || resourceExtname == .jsx || resourceExtname == .tsx || resourceExtname == .css || resourceExtname == .scss || resourceExtname == .less || resourceExtname == .sass

commandPalette.when: resourceExtname == .js || resourceExtname == .ts || resourceExtname == .jsx || resourceExtname == .tsx || resourceExtname == .css || resourceExtname == .scss || resourceExtname == .less || resourceExtname == .sass

resourceExtname == .js || resourceExtname == .ts || resourceExtname == .jsx || resourceExtname == .tsx || resourceExtname == .css || resourceExtname == .scss || resourceExtname == .less || resourceExtname == .sass

resourceExtname == .js || resourceExtname == .ts || resourceExtname == .jsx || resourceExtname == .tsx || resourceExtname == .css || resourceExtname == .scss || resourceExtname == .less || resourceExtname == .sass

sortImports.maxLineLength.description: Maximum line length before breaking imports into multiple lines (default: 100)

sortImports.aliasPrefixes.description: Prefixes that should be treated as absolute imports

sortImports.detectAliasesFromProjectConf.description: Automatically detect alias prefixes from nearby tsconfig/jsconfig files and simple vite/webpack alias definitions

sortImports.enableStyleSorting.description: Enable sorting of CSS/SCSS/SASS/LESS declarations in style files

sortImports.styleExtensions.description: File extensions that should be grouped as style imports

sortImports.styleGroupsOrder.description: Custom order for style property groups. The internal property order inside each group stays built in

sortImports.groupsOrder.description: Custom output order for import and related groups. Add "spacing" to insert an empty line between groups

sortImports.sortOnSave.description: Automatically sort imports when a supported file is saved

sortImports.sortMode.description: Sorting mode for imports and named specifiers: by length (default) or alphabetically

sortImports.mergeDuplicateImports.description: Merge compatible duplicate imports from the same source while sorting
